title: Cuneiform Tablet #0231: Early Dynastic Sale Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a sale contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a sale contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Early Dynastic period. Sale Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records sale contract matters typical of Early Dynastic period administrative or literary practice.
